Immerse yourself in relaxation at our award-winning spa. Offering a full range of treatments inspired by ancient healing traditions and modern wellness techniques, our spa is a sanctuary for mind, body, and spirit.

Treatments

  • Swedish and deep tissue massage
  • Aromatherapy and hot stone treatments
  • Facials and skin care rituals
  • Couples spa experiences

body.processed:
Take a dip in our stunning rooftop infinity pool with breathtaking panoramic views of the city skyline. The heated pool area includes private cabanas, poolside dining service, and a dedicated cocktail bar.

Pool Features

  • Heated infinity-edge pool
  • Private cabanas available for rent
  • Poolside food and beverage service
  • Complimentary towels and sunscreen
body.summary: Take a dip in our stunning rooftop infinity pool with breathtaking panoramic views of the city skyline. The heated pool area includes private cabanas, poolside dining service, and a dedicated cocktail

nodes.title: The Meridian Restaurant

body.processed:
Experience culinary excellence at The Meridian, our signature restaurant featuring farm-to-table cuisine crafted by award-winning Chef Isabella Moreno. The elegant dining room provides the perfect setting for an unforgettable meal.

Dining Experiences

  • Seasonal tasting menus
  • Extensive wine collection
  • Private dining rooms available
  • Weekend brunch with live music
body.summary: Experience culinary excellence at The Meridian, our signature restaurant featuring farm-to-table cuisine crafted by award-winning Chef Isabella Moreno. The elegant dining room provides the perfect set

nodes.hours: Breakfast 7-10 AM, Lunch 12-2 PM, Dinner 6-10 PM

body.processed:
Stay active during your stay at our state-of-the-art fitness center. Equipped with the latest cardio and strength training equipment, along with a dedicated yoga studio and personal training services.

Facilities

  • Technogym cardio and strength equipment
  • Dedicated yoga and pilates studio
  • Personal training sessions
  • Complimentary fitness classes
body.summary: Stay active during your stay at our state-of-the-art fitness center. Equipped with the latest cardio and strength training equipment, along with a dedicated yoga studio and personal training services.
